output:
max(requested_max_attempts, 1),
            int(self.limits["max_model_attempts"]),
        )
        if len(models) > 1 and max_attempts < 2:
            max_attempts = 2

        requested_timeout = int(
            req.get("timeout_seconds", self.limits["model_timeout_seconds"])
        )
        timeout = min(
            max(requested_timeout, 30),
            int(self.limits["model_timeout_seconds"]),
        )
        model_plan = [
            models[min(index, len(models) - 1)]
            for index in range(max_attempts)
        ]
        request_record["authoring_policy"] = {
            "endpoint": model_policy["base_url"],
            "primary_model": primary,
            "fallback_model": fallback,
            "installed_approved_models": models,
            "model_attempt_plan": model_plan,
            "requested_max_attempts": requested_max_attempts,
            "effective_max_attempts": max_attempts,
            "requested_timeout_seconds": requested_timeout,
            "effective_timeout_seconds": timeout,
            "streaming": True,
            "think": False,
            "temperature": 0.1,
        }
        request_record["prompt_sha256"] = prompt_hash
        request_record["prompt_chars"] = len(system) + 1 + len(user)
        atomic_write_json(workspace / "request.json", request_record)
        attempts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        errors: list[str] = []
        candidate_files: list[dict[str, str]] | None = None
        selected_model: str | None = None
        response_value: dict[str, Any] | None = None
        for attempt_number, model in enumerate(model_plan, start=1):
            selected_model = model
            retry_note = ""
            if errors:
                retry_note = "\nPrevious output validation errors:\n- " + "\n- ".join(errors[-3:])
            started = time.time()
            try:
                stream_path = authoring / f"stream-{attempt_number}.jsonl"
                response = self._ollama_chat(
                    model,
                    [
                        {"role": "system", "content": system},
                        {"role": "user", "content": user + retry_note},
                    ],
                    timeout,
                    progress_path=stream_path,
                )
                content = response["content"]
                raw_path = authoring / f"response-{attempt_number}.txt"
                atomic_write_text(raw_path, content)
                value = self._parse_model_json(content)
                files = self._validate_model_files(value, targets)
                candidate_files = files
                response_value = value
                attempts.append(
                    {
                        "attempt": attempt_number,
                        "model": model,
                        "passed": True,
                        "response_sha256": sha256_bytes(content.encode("utf-8")),
                        "duration_seconds": round(time.time() - started, 3),
                        "ollama": {
                            k: response.get(k)
                            for k in (
                                "done",
                                "done_reason",
                                "eval_count",
                                "prompt_eval_count",
                                "total_duration",
                                "response_bytes",
                                "stream_chunks",
                            )
                        },
                        "stream_record": str(stream_path.relative_to(self.repo)),
                    }
                )
                break
            except Exception as exc:
                errors.append(str(exc))
                attempts.append(
                    {
                        "attempt": attempt_number,
                        "model": model,
                        "passed": False,
                        "error": str(exc),
                        "error_type": type(exc).__name__,
                        "duration_seconds": round(time.time() - started, 3),
                    }
                )
        if candidate_files is None or response_value is None or selected_model is None:
            atomic_write_json(authoring / "attempts.json", attempts)
            error_message = (
                f"Candidate authoring failed after {len(attempts)} attempts: "
                f"{errors[-1] if errors else 'unknown'}"
            )
            failure_state = {
                "job_id": job_id,
                "run_id": workspace.name,
                "status": "failed",
                "stage": "authoring",
                "updated_at": iso_now(),
                "selected_model": selected_model,
                "attempts_completed": len(attempts),
                "error_type": (
                    attempts[-1].get("error_type")
                    if attempts
                    else "GovernedError"
                ),
                "error": error_message,
            }
            atomic_write_json(workspace / "run-state.json", failure_state)
            self._audit(
                "author_candidate",
                req,
                {
                    "ok": False,
                    "status": "failed",
                    "job_id": job_id,
                    "run_id": workspace.name,
                    "error": error_message,
                },
            )
            raise GovernedError(error_message)
        candidate_root = workspace / "candidate"
        if candidate_root.exists():
            shutil.rmtree(candidate_root)
        manifest_files: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for item in candidate_files:
            path = candidate_root / item["path"]
            path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            atomic_write_text(path, item["content"])
            manifest_files.append(
                {
                    "path": item["path"],
                    "size": path.stat().st_size,
                    "sha256": sha256_file(path),
                }
            )
        model_record = {
            "endpoint": model_policy["base_url"],
            "primary_model": primary,
            "fallback_model": fallback,
            "selected_model": selected_model,
            "fallback_used": selected_model == fallback,
            "prompt_sha256": prompt_hash,
            "attempts": attempts,
            "summary": response_value.get("summary"),
            "notes": response_value.get("notes", []),
        }
        atomic_write_json(authoring / "model-record.json", model_record)
        atomic_write_json(workspace / "candidate-manifest.json", {"files": manifest_files})
        run_state = {
            "job_id": job_id,
            "run_id": workspace.name,
            "status": "authored",
            "updated_at": iso_now(),
            "selected_model": selected_model,
        }
        atomic_write_json(workspace / "run-state.json", run_state)
        result = {
            "ok": True,
            "summary": "Candidate authored in governed staging",
            "job_id": job_id,
            "run_id": workspace.name,
            "workspace": str(workspace.relative_to(self.repo)),
            "selected_model": selected_model,
            "fallback_used": selected_model == fallback,
            "candidate_files": manifest_files,
            "live_files_modified": False,
        }
        self._audit("author_candidate", req, result
